peer_proposed.name: GraniteShares NVIDIA -3x Short Daily ETP

full_scan_scope: 29 instruments: US benchmark ETFs (QQQ, SPY, SMH, SOXX, IWM, DIA, XLK, XLF, XLE, XLV), volatility (^VIX), bonds/FX/commodities (TLT, GLD, USO, DX-Y.NYB, BTC-USD), key underlying single names (NVDA, TSLA, TSM, MU, AMD, AVGO, ARM, AMZN, MSFT, META, PLTR, GOOG, AAPL). Intel-only, never tradable, max 500 tickers, 10% compute budget, 600s scan cadence.

Purpose: regime detection, sector rotation, macro context

rationale: Phase 7 institutional audit establishing formal governance framework for the NZT-48 three-tier universe (CORE/PEER/FULL_SCAN). No changes to CORE recommended. Peer universe of 6 tickers confirmed (AMD3.L, ARM3.L, NVDS.L, TSLS.L, 3LDE.L, 3LEU.L). Recommends adding 3SSM.L to peer candidate pool. Defines formal approval workflow, quarterly review cadence, and objective split enforcement for MAX_INTRADAY_GAINS (CORE) vs 2% reporting framing (non-CORE).
